title: 安田記念の後に・燃える戦場へ

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
First place goes to Hishi Amazon! She takes the
win, staying true to her promise!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon was awesome! I wonder where we'll
see her next?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I hope she'll turn up at the Japan Cup or the
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
And if Narita Brian makes an appearance, we can
count on a great race.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yeeeah! Did you see that, Teach?! I won!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I won first place, just like I promised. This
victory should help build up my reputation a bit
more, eh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The only race left is my one-on-one at the Arima
Kinen...

Hishi Amazon looks like she has something on her
mind.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking... Before we take on the Arima
Kinen, could we have a go at another big race
first?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I only ran the Osaka Hai and the Yasuda Kinen in
order to prep for the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The idea was for me to beef up in time for the big
race, right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But you know what? I had so much fun out there!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The competition was super intense! It was
electrifying!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I feel like another tough battle like that would make me even stronger, and...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Why am I beating around the bush? What I'm
trying to say is—I want to run in the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I want to experience another real excitin'
one-on-one!

Hishi Amazon is already buzzing with excitement
just thinking about the thrilling battle ahead.
And I see no reason to slow her roll.
choice_data_list: Of course you can run it!

text_block_list.text:
We set our sights on the Japan Cup, where only
the best of the best gather to race!
